task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the analytic plan named 'Department Costs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo screen showing 'Analytic Plans' with a plan named 'Department Costs' created or in the process of being saved.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the three required analytic accounts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an Odoo screen showing 'Analytic Accounts' with 'Engineering Dept', 'Marketing Dept', and 'Operations Dept' listed and associated with the 'Department Costs' plan.

task_completion.description: Verify a vendor bill is created for 'Deco Addict' with the correct description and amount.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a Vendor Bill form with the Vendor set to 'Deco Addict', a line item labeled 'IT Infrastructure Consulting - Q1', and a total amount of $12,000.00.

task_completion.description: Verify the analytic distribution is correctly applied to the bill line.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Analytic' or 'Analytic Distribution' column/popup on the bill line showing the exact allocation: 50% Engineering Dept, 30% Marketing Dept, and 20% Operations Dept.

task_completion.description: Verify the vendor bill has been posted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the status ribbon on the vendor bill showing 'Posted' instead of 'Draft', or the presence of a 'Reset to Draft' button indicating the bill is already confirmed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo 17.0 UI, not terminal windows executing API scripts or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the data into actual Odoo forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The plan names, account names, vendor, amounts, and percentages should be visible inside standard Odoo form fields, dropdowns, or list views, rather than mocked up in a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI using direct database manipulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running psql commands or python scripts to inject data directly into the 'odoo_demo' database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Odoo Version: 17.0. Analytic Plan Name: 'Department Costs'. Analytic Accounts: 'Engineering Dept', 'Marketing Dept', 'Operations Dept'. Vendor Bill Details: Vendor is 'Deco Addict', Description is 'IT Infrastructure Consulting - Q1', Total Amount is $12,000.00. Analytic Distribution: 50% to Engineering Dept, 30% to Marketing Dept, and 20% to Operations Dept. The bill must be in a 'Posted' state.
